LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT CONSENTED TO JURISDICTION OF THIS COURT BY FAILING TO SUMMARILY OBJECT TO JURISDICTION WHEN IT FILED AN ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT HAS ALSO FAILED TO SUBMIT EVIDENCE REFUTING PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE THEREBY FAILING TO RAISE ANY TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. ACCORDINGLY PLAINTIFF HAS MET ITS EVIDENTIARY BURDEN WARRANTING THE GRANT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOREOVER, THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT DEFENDANT'S ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR JUDGMENT AGAINST THEM. FURTHERMORE FOLLOWING ORAL ARGUMENT, THE COURT REVIEWED, AT DEFENDANTS' REQUEST, THE SOBREMONTE V. SUP. CRT. CASE 61 CAL.APP.4TH 980. IN LOOKING AT THE FACTORS IN DETERMINING WHETHER A PARTY HAS WAIVED ARBITRATION AND APPLYING THEM TO THIS CASE, THE COURT REAFFIRMS ITS DETERMINATION THAT DEFENDANTS WAIVED THEIR RIGHT TO ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS EVENT PRODUCTIONS, INC AND DENIS EGAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF JUNE 30 RULING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
